name: Brew & Foam
tagline: Hidden in a Waialua shopping center away from tourist Haleiwa — serious baristas and one of the best matcha lattes on the island.
talkStory: Tucked in a low-key shopping center in Waialua, well away from tourist Haleiwa. The baristas take their craft seriously, and the matcha latte is one of the best on the island. Locals from the North Shore come here specifically because it's not in Haleiwa — no tourist traffic, no lines, just good coffee. Morning, any day of the week.
